name: com.nexenovastudios.services
description: Reusable Unity Gaming Services integration for hyper-casual and mobile games: Authentication (anonymous, Google Play Games, Apple), Economy, Cloud Save, Remote Config and In-App Purchases. Async-first (UniTask), DI-driven (VContainer), event-decoupled modules.

samples.description: Boot scene with ServicesLifetimeScope + ServicesBootController and a demo settings asset.
